title: centaurea granatensis subsp. boetica
intro: Centaurea granatensis subsp. boetica, also known as Spanish scabious, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centaurea granatensis subsp. boetica include its potential to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
